Class Maven

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.ToolContext
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.AnahataToolkit
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.maven.Maven
All Implemented Interfaces:
ContextProvider, PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class Maven extends AnahataToolkit
Consolidated "super-tool" class for all Maven-related AI operations. This class combines functionality from the deprecated Maven, MavenPom, and MavenSearch classes. It serves as the single, definitive entry point for searching, modifying, and executing Maven tasks.
Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • Maven

      public Maven()

  • Method Details

    • getSystemInstructions

      public List<String> getSystemInstructions() throws Exception
      Gets a list of system instruction strings provided by this context provider. These are typically prepended to the conversation as high-level guidance.

      Provides context-aware instructions for the Maven toolkit, specifying the current path to the Maven executable as configured in the IDE.

      Returns:
      A list of system instruction strings.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during instruction generation.

    • getNbCommandLineMavenPath

      public static String getNbCommandLineMavenPath()
      Gets the path to the Maven installation configured in NetBeans.

      Accesses the IDE's Maven preferences node to retrieve the standardized command-line Maven path.

      Returns:
      the Maven path, or a failure message if not found or execution fails.

    • populateMessage

      public void populateMessage(RagMessage ragMessage)
      Populates the given RagMessage with dynamic, just-in-time context parts. These parts are appended to the end of the user's prompt (RAG).

      Populates the RAG message with current NetBeans Maven preferences and detected paths.

      Parameters:
      ragMessage - The message to be augmented with context.

    • searchMavenIndex

      public MavenSearchResultPage searchMavenIndex(String query, Integer startIndex, Integer pageSize) throws Exception
      Searches the Maven index for artifacts matching a given query.

      This method performs a multi-field search (groupId, artifactId, version, name, description, classes) across all repositories configured in NetBeans. It supports pagination and handles query splitting for multi-keyword searches.

      Parameters:
      query - The search query, with terms separated by spaces (e.g., 'junit platform').
      startIndex - The starting index (0-based) for pagination. Defaults to 0 if null.
      pageSize - The maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 100 if null.
      Returns:
      a MavenSearchResultPage containing the found artifacts.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during the index query or result processing.

    • addDependency

      public AddDependencyResult addDependency(String projectPath, String groupId, String artifactId, String version, String scope, String classifier, String type)
      The definitive 'super-tool' for adding a Maven dependency.

      This tool follows a safe, multi-phase process:

      1. Pre-flight: Verifies artifact existence in remote repositories.
      2. Modification: Atomically adds the dependency to the project's pom.xml.
      3. Resolution: Runs dependency:resolve to ensure transitive dependencies are satisfied.
      4. Background: Triggers asynchronous download of sources and javadocs.

      Finally, it triggers a NetBeans project reload to reflect changes in the IDE.

      Parameters:
      projectPath - The absolute path of the project to modify.
      groupId - The groupId of the dependency.
      artifactId - The artifactId of the dependency.
      version - The version of the dependency.
      scope - The scope of the dependency (e.g., 'compile', 'test'). If null, defaults to 'compile'.
      classifier - The classifier of the dependency (e.g., 'jdk17'). Can be null.
      type - The type of the dependency (e.g., 'test-jar'). If null, defaults to 'jar'.
      Returns:
      an AddDependencyResult object containing the outcome of each phase.

    • getDeclaredDependencies

      public static List<DependencyScope> getDeclaredDependencies(String projectPath) throws Exception
      Gets the list of dependencies directly declared in the pom.xml.
      Parameters:
      projectPath - The absolute path of the project to analyze.
      Returns:
      a list of DependencyScope objects.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs.

    • getResolvedDependencies

      public List<ResolvedDependencyScope> getResolvedDependencies(String projectPath) throws Exception
      Gets the final, fully resolved list of transitive dependencies for the project.
      Parameters:
      projectPath - The absolute path of the project to analyze.
      Returns:
      a list of ResolvedDependencyScope objects.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs.

    • groupDeclaredDependencies

      private static List<DependencyScope> groupDeclaredDependencies(List<org.apache.maven.model.Dependency> dependencies)
      Groups a list of flat Maven dependencies into a hierarchical structure by scope and groupId.
      Parameters:
      dependencies - The flat list of Maven dependencies.
      Returns:
      A list of DependencyScope objects representing the grouped structure.

    • groupResolvedArtifacts

      private static List<ResolvedDependencyScope> groupResolvedArtifacts(Collection<org.apache.maven.artifact.Artifact> artifacts)
      Groups a collection of resolved Maven artifacts into a hierarchical structure by scope and groupId.
      Parameters:
      artifacts - The collection of resolved artifacts.
      Returns:
      A list of ResolvedDependencyScope objects representing the grouped structure.

    • runGoals

      public MavenBuildResult runGoals(String projectPath, List<String> goals, List<String> profiles, Map<String,String> properties, List<String> options, Long timeout) throws Exception
      Executes a list of Maven goals on a Project synchronously.
      Parameters:
      projectPath - The ID of the project to run the goals on.
      goals - A list of Maven goals to execute.
      profiles - A list of profiles to activate.
      properties - A map of properties to set.
      options - A list of additional Maven options.
      timeout - The maximum time to wait for the build to complete.
      Returns:
      a MavenBuildResult object.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs.

    • extractBuildPhases

      private static List<MavenBuildResult.BuildPhase> extractBuildPhases(org.netbeans.modules.maven.execute.MavenCommandLineExecutor executor)
      Extracts the build phases and their outcomes from the Maven executor using reflection.
      Parameters:
      executor - The Maven executor.
      Returns:
      A list of build phases.

    • collectPhases

      private static void collectPhases(org.netbeans.modules.maven.execute.cmd.ExecutionEventObject.Tree node, List<MavenBuildResult.BuildPhase> phases)
      Recursively collects build phases from the execution event tree.
      Parameters:
      node - The current node in the tree.
      phases - The list to populate.

    • downloadProjectDependencies

      public String downloadProjectDependencies(String projectPath, List<String> classifiers) throws Exception
      Downloads all missing dependencies artifacts for a given Maven project.
      Parameters:
      projectPath - The absolute path of the project to download dependencies for.
      classifiers - A list of classifiers to download.
      Returns:
      a message indicating the result of the operation.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs.

    • downloadDependencyArtifact

      public boolean downloadDependencyArtifact(String projectPath, String groupId, String artifactId, String version, String classifier, String type) throws Exception
      Downloads a specific classified artifact for a single dependency.
      Parameters:
      projectPath - The absolute path of the project to use for repository context.
      groupId - The groupId of the dependency.
      artifactId - The artifactId of the dependency.
      version - The version of the dependency.
      classifier - The classifier of the artifact to download.
      type - The type of the dependency.
      Returns:
      true on success, false on failure.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs.

    • downloadArtifact

      private static boolean downloadArtifact(org.netbeans.modules.maven.embedder.MavenEmbedder embedder, org.netbeans.modules.maven.api.NbMavenProject project, org.apache.maven.artifact.Artifact art, String classifier, StringBuilder errors)
      Attempts to resolve and download a specific artifact (or classified variant like sources/javadoc) using the provided Maven embedder.
      Parameters:
      embedder - The Maven embedder to use for resolution.
      project - The project providing the remote repository configuration.
      art - The base artifact to resolve.
      classifier - The classifier to resolve (e.g., 'sources', 'javadoc', or null for main).
      errors - A StringBuilder to capture any resolution error messages.
      Returns:
      true if the artifact was successfully resolved and downloaded to the local repository.

    • buildResultString

      private static String buildResultString(String artifactType, String targetType, String targetId, int success, int failed, StringBuilder errors)
      Builds a human-readable summary string for a batch download operation.
      Parameters:
      artifactType - The name of the artifact type being downloaded (e.g., 'Sources').
      targetType - The type of the target (e.g., 'Project', 'Artifact').
      targetId - The identifier of the target.
      success - The number of successfully downloaded artifacts.
      failed - The number of artifacts that failed to download.
      errors - A StringBuilder containing the accumulated error details.
      Returns:
      A descriptive result string.
